{\n321\t    Timeout,\n322\t    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n323\t    NetworkError(String),\n324\t}\n325\t\n326\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n327\tpub struct SearchRequest {\n328\t    pub index_uid: String,\n329\t    pub query: Option<String>,\n330\t    pub offset: usize,\n331\t    pub limit: usize,\n332\t    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n333\t    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n334\t    pub ranking_score: bool,\n335\t    pub body: Value,\n336\t    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n337\t    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n338\t}\n339\t\n340\timpl SearchRequest {\n341\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n342\t    ///\n343\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n344\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n345\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n346\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n347\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n348\t\n349\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n350\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n351\t\n352\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n353\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n354\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n355\t\n356\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n357\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n358\t\n359\t        // Ensure query is set\n360\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n361\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n365\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n366\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n367\t        }\n368\t\n369\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n370\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n371\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        body\n375\t    }\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t#[derive(Debug)]\n379\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n380\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n381\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n382\t    pub partial: bool,\n383\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n387\tpub fn plan_search_scatter(\n388\t    topology: &Topology,\n389\t    query_seq: u64,\n390\t    rf: usize,\n391\t    shard_count: u32,\n392\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n393\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n394\t\n395\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n396\t        Some(g) => g,\n397\t        None => {\n398\t            return ScatterPlan {\n399\t                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n400\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n401\t            };\n402\t        }\n403\t    };\n404\t\n405\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n406\t\n407\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n408\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n409\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n410\t        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n411\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n412\t    }\n413\t\n414\t    ScatterPlan {\n415\t        chosen_group,\n416\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n417\t        shard_to_node,\n418\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n419\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n420\t    }\n421\t}\n422\t\n423\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n424\t///\n425\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n426\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n427\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n428\t    topology: &Topology,\n429\t    query_seq: u64,\n430\t    rf: usize,\n431\t    shard_count: u32,\n432\t    index: &str,\n433\t    floor: u64,\n434\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n435\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n436\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n437\t\n438\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n439\t\n440\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n441\t        shard_count,\n442\t        group,\n443\t        rf,\n444\t        query_seq,\n445\t        index,\n446\t        floor,\n447\t        version_checker,\n448\t    )?;\n449\t\n450\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n451\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n452\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n453\t        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n454\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n455\t            .iter()\n456\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n457\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n458\t                version >= floor\n459\t            })\n460\t            .collect();\n461\t\n462\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n463\t            return None;\n464\t        }\n465\t\n466\t        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n467\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n468\t    }\n469\t\n470\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n471\t        chosen_group,\n472\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n473\t        shard_to_node,\n474\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n475\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n476\t    })\n477\t}\n478\t\n479\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n480\t///\n481\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n482\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n483\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n484\t    topology: &Topology,\n485\t    query_seq: u64,\n486\t    rf: usize,\n487\t    shard_count: u32,\n488\t    pinned_group: u32,\n489\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n490\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n491\t\n492\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n493\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n494\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n495\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n496\t            continue;\n497\t        }\n498\t        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n499\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n500\t    }\n501\t\n502\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n503\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n504\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n505\t        shard_to_node,\n506\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n507\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n508\t    })\n509\t}\n510\t\n511\t/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n512\t///\n513\t/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n514\t/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n515\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n516\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n517\t    topology: &Topology,\n518\t    query_seq: u64,\n519\t    rf: usize,\n520\t    shard_count: u32,\n521\t    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n522\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n523\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n524\t\n525\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n526\t        Some(g) => g,\n527\t        None => {\n528\t            return ScatterPlan {\n529\t                chosen_group,\n530\t                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n531\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n532\t                deadline_ms: 0,\n533\t                hedging_eligible: false,\n534\t            };\n535\t        }\n536\t    };\n537\t\n538\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n539\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n540\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n541\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n542\t            continue;\n543\t        }\n544\t\n545\t        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n546\t        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n547\t            Some(node) => node,\n548\t            None => {\n549\t                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n550\t                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n551\t            }\n552\t        };\n553\t\n554\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n555\t    }\n556\t\n557\t    ScatterPlan {\n558\t        chosen_group,\n559\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n560\t        shard_to_node,\n561\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n562\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n563\t    }\n564\t}\n565\t\n566\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n567\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n568\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n569\t    client: &C,\n570\t    req: SearchRequest,\n571\t    topology: &Topology,\n572\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n573\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n574\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n575\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n576\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n577\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n578\t        }\n579\t    }\n580\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n581\t\n582\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n583\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n584\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n585\t\n586\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n587\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n588\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n589\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n590\t            None => {\n591\t                for shard_id in shards {\n592\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n593\t                }\n594\t                continue;\n595\t            }\n596\t        };\n597\t        let client_ref = client;\n598\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n599\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n600\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n601\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n602\t        let span = info_span!(\n603\t            \"scatter_node\",\n604\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n605\t            address = %node.address,\n606\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n607\t        );\n608\t        tasks.push(async move {\n609\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n610\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n611\t        }.instrument(span));\n612\t    }\n613\t\n614\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n615\t\n616\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n617\t        match result {\n618\t            Ok(body) => {\n619\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n620\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n621\t                }\n622\t            }\n623\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n624\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n625\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n626\t            }\n627\t            Err(e) => {\n628\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n629\t            }\n630\t        }\n631\t    }\n632\t\n633\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n634\t\n635\t    match policy {\n636\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n637\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n638\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n639\t            }\n640\t        }\n641\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n642\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n643\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n644\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n645\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n646\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n647\t\n648\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n649\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n650\t\n651\t                    // Try each other replica group\n652\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n653\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n654\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n655\t                        }\n656\t\n657\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n658\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n659\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n660\t                                continue;\n661\t                            }\n662\t\n663\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n664\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n665\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n666\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n667\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n668\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n669\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n670\t                                            break;\n671\t                                        }\n672\t                                        Err(_) => {\n673\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n674\t                                        }\n675\t                                    }\n676\t                                }\n677\t                            }\n678\t\n679\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n680\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n681\t                            }\n682\t                        }\n683\t                    }\n684\t\n685\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n686\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n687\t                    }\n688\t                }\n689\t\n690\t                // Merge fallback results\n691\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n692\t\n693\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n694\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n695\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n696\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n697\t                        shard_pages,\n698\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n699\t                        partial: false,\n700\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n701\t                    });\n702\t                } else {\n703\t                    // Some shards still failed\n704\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n705\t                }\n706\t            }\n707\t        }\n708\t    }\n709\t\n710\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n711\t}\n712\t\n713\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n714\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n715\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n716\t    client: &C,\n717\t    req: SearchRequest,\n718\t    topology: &Topology,\n719\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n720\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n721\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n722\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n723\t\n724\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n725\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n726\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n727\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n728\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n729\t            });\n730\t        }\n731\t    }\n732\t\n733\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n734\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n735\t\n736\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n737\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n738\t        offset: req.offset,\n739\t        limit: req.limit,\n740\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n741\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n742\t        failed_shards,\n743\t    };\n744\t\n745\t    // Span for the merge operation\n746\t    let _span = info_span!(\n747\t        \"merge\",\n748\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n749\t        offset = req.offset,\n750\t        limit = req.limit,\n751\t    ).entered();\n752\t\n753\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n754\t}\n755\t\n756\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n757\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n758\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n759\t\n760\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n761\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n762\t    match query {\n763\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n764\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n765\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n766\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n767\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n768\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n769\t            }\n770\t            terms\n771\t        }\n772\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n773\t    }\n774\t}\n775\t\n776\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n777\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n778\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n779\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n780\t    client: &C,\n781\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n782\t    topology: &Topology,\n783\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n784\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n785\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n786\t    }\n787\t\n788\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n789\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n790\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n791\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n792\t        }\n793\t    }\n794\t\n795\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n796\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n797\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n798\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n799\t            None => continue,\n800\t        };\n801\t        let client_ref = client;\n802\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n803\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n804\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n805\t    }\n806\t\n807\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n808\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n809\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n810\t}\n811\t\n812\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n813\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n814\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n815\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n816\t    client: &C,\n817\t    req: SearchRequest,\n818\t    topology: &Topology,\n819\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n820\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n821\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n822\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n823\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n824\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n825\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n826\t    };\n827\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n828\t    let mut search_req = req;\n829\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n830\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n831\t}\n832\t\n833\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n834\t// Mock client\n835\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n836\t\n837\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n838\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n839\t    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId,  }\n866\t\n867\t    async fn write_documents(\n868\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n869\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n870\t            error_type: None,\n905\t        })\n906\t    }\n907\t\n908\t    async fn fetch_documents(\n909\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n910\t    ) ->       }\n948\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n949\t                task_uid,\n950\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n951\t                error: None,\n952\t                error_type: None,\n953\t            })\n954\t        }\n955\t    }\n956\t}\n957\t\n958\t#[cfg(test)]\n959\tmod tests {\n960\t    use super::*;\n961\t    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n962\t\n963\t    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n964\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n965\t        for i in 0u32..6 {\n966\t            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n967\t            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n968\t            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n969\t            topo.add_node(node);\n970\t        }\n971\t        topo\n972\t    }\n973\t\n974\t    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n975\t        SearchRequest {\n976\t            index_uid: None,\n979\t        }\n980\t    }\n981\t\n982\t    #[test]\n983\t    fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n984\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n985\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n1084\t    }\n1085\t\n1086\t    #[test]\n1087\t    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1088\t        let resp = vec![\n1089\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n1090\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1094\t        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n1095\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1096\t    }\n1097\t\n1098\t    #[test]\n1099\t    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n1100\t        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n1101\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n1102\t        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n1103\t    }\n1104\t\n1105\t    #[tokio::test]\n1106\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1107\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1108\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1109\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1110\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1111\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1112\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1113\t        });\n1114\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1115\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1116\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1117\t        });\n1118\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1119\t            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n1120\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n1121\t        });\n1122\t        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n1123\t        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1124\t        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n1125\t        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n1126\t    }\n1127\t\n1128\t    #[tokio::test]\n1129\t    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n1130\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1131\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1132\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1133\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1134\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1135\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1136\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1137\t        });\n1138\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1139\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1140\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1141\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1142\t    }\n1143\t\n1144\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1145\t    ///\n1146\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1147\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1148\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1149\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1150\t    ///\n1151\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1152\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1153\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1154\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1155\t    ///\n1156\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1157\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1158\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1159\t    ///\n1160\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1161\t    #[tokio::test]\n1162\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1163\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1164\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1165\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1166\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1167\t\n1168\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n1169\t\n1170\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1171\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1172\t\n1173\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1174\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1175\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1176\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1177\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1178\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1179\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1180\t            ]),\n1181\t        });\n1182\t\n1183\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1184\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1185\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1186\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1187\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1188\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1189\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1190\t            ]),\n1191\t        });\n1192\t\n1193\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1194\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1195\t            total_docs: 10,\n1196\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1197\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1198\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1199\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1200\t            ]),\n1201\t        });\n1202\t\n1203\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1204\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1205\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1206\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1207\t            filter: None,\n1208\t        };\n1209\t\n1210\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1211\t\n1212\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1213\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1214\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1215\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1216\t\n1217\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1218\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1219\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1220\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1221\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1222\t\n1223\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1224\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1225\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1226\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1227\t\n1228\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1229\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1230\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1231\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1232\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1233\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1234\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1235\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1236\t    }\n1237\t\n1238\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1239\t    #[tokio::test]\n1240\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1241\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1242\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1243\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1244\t\n1245\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1246\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1247\t            terms: vec![],\n1248\t            filter: None,\n1249\t        };\n1250\t\n1251\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1252\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1253\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1254\t    }\n1255\t\n1256\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1257\t    #[tokio::test]\n1258\t    async fn test_dfs_partial_failure() {\n1259\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1260\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1261\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1262\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1263\t\n1264\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n1265\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1266\t\n1267\t        // Node 0 returns valid data\n1268\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1269\t            total_docs: 50000,\n1270\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1271\t            term_stats: c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1276\t            total_docs: 30000,\n1277\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1278\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1279\t        });\n1280\t\n1281\t        // Node 2 fails\n1282\t        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), filter: None,\n1288\t        };\n1289\t\n1290\t        // Should aggregate from successful nodes only\n1291\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1292\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 80000);\n1293\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"test\").unwrap().df, 8000);\n1294\t    }\n1295\t\n1296\t    /// Test that to_node_body correctly injects showRankingScore: true and sets limit to offset + limit.\n1297\t    #[test]\n1298\t    fn test_to_node_body_injects_show_ranking_score() {\n1299\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1300\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1301\t            query: Some(\"rust programming\".into()),\n1302\t            offset: 10,\n1303\t            limit: 20,\n1304\t            filter: Some(serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")),\n1305\t            facets: Some(vec![\"category\".into(), \"tags\".into()]),\n1306\t            ranking_score: false, // Client didn't request scores\n1307\t            body: serde_json::json!({\"custom\": \"field\"}),\n1308\t            global_idf: None,\n1309\t        };\n1310\t\n1311\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1312\t\n1313\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1314\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1315\t\n1316\t        // limit must be offset + limit (coordinator pagination)\n1317\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(30)));\n1318\t\n1319\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1320\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1321\t\n1322\t        // query must be set\n1323\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"q\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"rust programming\")));\n1324\t\n1325\t        // filter must be set\n1326\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"filter\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"status = published\")));\n1327\t\n1328\t        // facets must be set\n1329\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"facets\"), Some(&serde_json::json!([\"category\", \"tags\"])));\n1330\t\n1331\t        // custom body field must be preserved\n1332\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"custom\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(\"field\")));\n1333\t    }\n1334\t\n1335\t    /// Test that to_node_body works with minimal request.\n1336\t    #[test]\n1337\t    fn test_to_node_body_minimal_request() {\n1338\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1339\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1340\t            query: None,\n1341\t            offset: 0,\n1342\t            limit: 10,\n1343\t            filter: None,\n1344\t            facets: None,\n1345\t            ranking_score: true, // Client requested scores\n1346\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1347\t            global_idf: None,\n1348\t        };\n1349\t\n1350\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1351\t\n1352\t        // showRankingScore must be true unconditionally\n1353\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"showRankingScore\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(true)));\n1354\t\n1355\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 10\n1356\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(10)));\n1357\t\n1358\t        // offset must be 0\n1359\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(0)));\n1360\t    }\n1361\t\n1362\t    /// Test that to_node_body handles large offset/limit correctly.\n1363\t    #[test]\n1364\t    fn test_to_node_body_pagination() {\n1365\t        let req = SearchRequest {\n1366\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1367\t            query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n1368\t            offset: 100,\n1369\t            limit: 50,\n1370\t            filter: None,\n1371\t            facets: None,\n1372\t            ranking_score: false,\n1373\t            body: serde_json::json!({}),\n1374\t            global_idf: None,\n1375\t        };\n1376\t\n1377\t        let body = req.to_node_body();\n1378\t\n1379\t        // limit must be offset + limit = 150 (fetch enough for coordinator pagination)\n1380\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"limit\"), Some(&serde_json::json!(150)));\n1381\t\n1382\t        // offset must be 0 (coordinator handles offset)\n1383\t        assert_eq!(body.get(\"offset\"), Scatter orchestration: fan-out logic and covering set builder.\n\nuse crate::config::UnavailableShardPolicy;\nuse crate::replica_selection::ReplicaSelector;\nuse tracing::{instrument, info_span, crate::topology::{NodeId, Topology};\nuse crate::Result;\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Scatter plan: the exact shard→node mapping for a search query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ScatterPlan {\n    pub chosen_group: u32,\n    pub target_shards: Vec<u32>,\n    pub shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId>,\n    pub deadline_ms: u32,\n    pub hedging_eligible: bool,\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// §15 OP#4: Global-IDF preflight (dfs_query_then_fetch pattern)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Per-term document frequency from a single shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n}\n\n/// Preflight request: gather term-frequency statistics from a shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub terms: Vec<String>,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a shard's preflight query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightResponse {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub term_stats: HashMap<String, TermStats>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global term statistics after coordinator aggregation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalTermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n    pub idf: f64,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalIdf {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub terms: HashMap<String, GlobalTermStats>,\n}\n\nimpl GlobalIdf {\n    /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n        for resp in responses {\n            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n            total_length / total_docs as f64\n        } else {\n            0.0\n        };\n\n        let n = total_docs as f64;\n        let terms = term_df\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(term, df)| {\n                let idf = if df == 0 {\n                    0.0\n                } else {\n                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n                };\n                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Write path: document operations (P2.2)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Request to add/replace documents on a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub documents: Vec<Value>,\n    pub primary_key: Option<String>,\n    /// Internal origin tag for CDC event suppression (plan §13.13).\n    /// - None = client write (always emitted to CDC)\n    /// - Some(\"antientropy\") = anti-entropy repair write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"reshard_backfill\") = reshard backfill write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"rollover\") = ILM rollover write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"ttl_expire\") = TTL expiration delete (suppressed unless emit_ttl_deletes)\n    ///\n    /// This field is NEVER stored on documents and never returned to clients.\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub origin: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's document write operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteResponse {\n    pub success: bool,\n    pub task_uid: Option<u64>,\n    pub message: Option<String>,\n    pub code: Option<String>,\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete documents by IDs.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub origin: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete all documents matching a filter.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub query\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's task status query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// The task UID\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n    /// Current task status\n    pub status: String,\n    /// Error message if failed\n    pub error: Option<String>,\n    /// Error type if failed\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\nimpl TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// Convert Meilisearch status string to NodeTaskStatus.\n    pub fn to_node_status(&self) -> crate::task::NodeTaskStatus {\n        match self.status.as_str() {\n            \"enqueued\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            \"processing\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Processing,\n            \"succeeded\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Succeeded,\n            \"failed\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Failed,\n            _ => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// HTTP client for communicating with a Meilisearch node.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait NodeClient: Send + Sync {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        address: &str,\n        request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError>;\n\n    /// Execute a preflight request (OP#4 global-IDF phase).\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(PreflightResponse { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() })\n    }\n\n    /// Write documents to a node NodeError> {\n        Ok(WriteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Get task status from a node.\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        async move {\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid: _request.task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Delete _request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub enum NodeError {\n    Timeout,\n    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n    NetworkError(String),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct SearchRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub query: Option<String>,\n    pub offset: usize,\n    pub limit: usize,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    pub ranking_score: bool,\n    pub body: Value,\n    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n}\n\nimpl SearchRequest {\n    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n    ///\n    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n    /// data to apply pagination.\n    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n\n        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n\n        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n\n        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n\n        // Ensure query is set\n        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n        }\n\n        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n        }\n\n        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n        }\n\n        body\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ScatterResult {\n    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n    pub partial: bool,\n    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub fn plan_search_scatter(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n///\n/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\npub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    floor: u64,\n    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n\n    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        rf,\n        query_seq,\n        index,\n        floor,\n        version_checker,\n    )?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n            .iter()\n            .filter(|node_id| {\n                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n                version >= floor\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        if eligible.is_empty() {\n            return None;\n        }\n\n        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n///\n/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\npub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    pinned_group: u32,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n///\n/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group,\n                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n                deadline_ms: 0,\n                hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n            Some(node) => node,\n            None => {\n                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n            }\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\npub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n\n    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => {\n                for shard_id in shards {\n                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n                }\n                continue;\n            }\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n        let shard_count = shards.len();\n        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n        let span = info_span!(\n            \"scatter_node\",\n            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n            address = %node.address,\n            shard_count = shard_count,\n        );\n        tasks.push(async move {\n            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n        }.instrument(span));\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n\n    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n        match result {\n            Ok(body) => {\n                for _shard_id in shards {\n                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n                }\n            }\n            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n                deadline_exceeded = true;\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n\n    match policy {\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n            }\n        }\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n\n                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n\n                    // Try each other replica group\n                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n                        }\n\n                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                                continue;\n                            }\n\n                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n                            for node_id in replicas {\n                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                                        Ok(body) => {\n                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n                                            break;\n                                        }\n                                        Err(_) => {\n                                            continue; // Try next replica\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n\n                            if fallback_succeeded {\n                                break; // Found a working replica\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Merge fallback results\n                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n\n                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n                        shard_pages,\n                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n                        partial: false,\n                        deadline_exceeded,\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    // Some shards still failed\n                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n\n    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n    if scatter_result.partial {\n        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n\n    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n        offset: req.offset,\n        limit: req.limit,\n        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n        failed_shards,\n    };\n\n    // Span for the merge operation\n    let _span = info_span!(\n        \"merge\",\n        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n        offset = req.offset,\n        limit = req.limit,\n    ).entered();\n\n    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\npub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n    match query {\n        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n            }\n            terms\n        }\n        _ => Vec::new(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\npub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: &PreflightRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n    }\n\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let nid = node_id.clone();\n        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n}\n\n/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n    };\n    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n    let mut search_req = req;\n    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock client\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\npub struct MockNodeClient {\n    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n    pub write_responses: HashMap<NodeId, WriteResponse>,\n    pub fetch_responses: HashMap<NodeId, FetchDocumentsResponse>,\n    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n    pub delay_ms: u64,\n}\n\nimpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.write_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            WriteResponse {\n                success: true,\n                task_uid: Some(1),\n                message: None,\n                code: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        // Return stored fetch response if available, otherwise return empty\n        let stored = self.fetch_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: 0,\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Handle pagination: if offset exceeds total, return empty results\n        if request.offset as u64 >= stored.total {\n            return Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: stored.total,\n            });\n        }\n\n        Ok(stored)\n    }\n\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        let node = node.clone();\n        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n        async move {\n            if let Some(err) = error {\n                return Err(err);\n            }\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n\n    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..6 {\n            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n        SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n            offset: 0, limit: 10, filter: None, facets: None,\n            ranking_score: false, body: serde_json::json!({}), global_idf: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan =
